label: Finished Product
description: Goods produced for sale to customers

label: Semi-finished Product
description: In-process goods consumed by higher-level FERT

label: Raw Material
description: Procured for production; not for sale

label: Packaging Material
description: Cartons, films, labels and shipping packaging

label: Trading Good
description: Procured and resold without further processing

label: Non-valuated Material
description: Tracked in stock but not financially valued

label: Non-stock Material
description: Consumed directly to a cost object, no inventory

label: Promotional / Advertising
description: POS displays, samples and marketing materials
